roa.docketEntryComment: PROBATION TRANSFER TO SAN JOAQUIN SENT

/CAL: APD 1203,9PC  MOTION TO TRANSFER OUT PROBATION FROM SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY TO SAN JOAQUIN COUNTY/MO GRTD/CTORD: PROBATION IS TRANSFERRED FROM SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY TO SAN JOAQUIN  COUNTY/X:COURT ORDER IS SIGNED AND FILED,/

/CAL:SENTENCE/AJW/CH1:ISS:PROB 2 Y:PJ 252D/CTS:252/DNACOMP/PPRFCOMP/IND/VF4:300/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/DTC/WS/RESTV/WEAP/RX/X:DEFENDANT NOT TO POSSESS ANY BURGLARY TOOLS/SA2:MATADOR RESTAURANTAT 679 SUTTER ST,; 427 STOCKTON ST; MACY'S AT 170 O'FARRELL ST, AND 369 SUTTER ST, ALL IN S,F, CA/SAORD3/SAORD/

/CAL:SENTENCE/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE ASSET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X:COURT DOES NOT HAVE A CURRENT PSR TO SENTENCE THE DEFENDANT/PRES:03-18-21/PPRF/X:DEFENDANT TO REPORT IMMEDIATELY TO THE APD FOR PREPARATION OFPSR/CONTD:SENTENCE/DOP/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/ORNAS/X:THE PEOPLE ORALLY AMEND THE COMPLAINT TOADD COUNT 005, A VIOLATION OF PENAL CODE SECTION 459 IN THE SECOND DEGREE,A FELONY/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADVRTS:005/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES:08-05-20/PPRF/REMA/ARBUCKLE/IBARRA/X:HARVEY WAIVER TAKEN AS TO COURT NO 19006128/SAORD/SA2:MATADOR RESTAURANT AT 679 SUTTER ST, 427 STOCKTON ST, MACY'S AT 170 O'FARRELL ST, AND369 SUTTER ST, ALL IN SAN FRANCISCO, CA/SAORD3/

/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW60/LDPX:07-20-20/987,2/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/X:SEESIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/CAL:SENTENCING/X:DEFENSE REQUEST FOR CONTIUANCE IS GRANTED BY THE COURT//CONT/DOP/
/CAL:BENCH WARRANT RETURN/DAWT/BWDNC/X:BAIL REMAINS SET AT $50,000/CTORD:UPDATED PRESENTENCE REPORT/PRES:05-10-21/PPRFCUST/CONTD:SENTENCE/DOPC/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:THE PEOPLE ARE NOT READY TO PROCEED/LDPX:07-20-20/TE:2 HOURS/CONT/DOP/
